query:
-- Add new columns to clients table
ALTER TABLE `clients`
  ADD COLUMN `planType` ENUM('monthly','package') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'monthly',
  ADD COLUMN `packageSessions` INT,
  ADD COLUMN `sessionsRemaining` INT,
  ADD COLUMN `packageValue` DECIMAL(10,2),
  ADD COLUMN `sessionsPerWeek` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  ADD COLUMN `sessionDays` VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN `sessionTime` VARCHAR(5),
  ADD COLUMN `sessionDuration` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  ADD COLUMN `prepaidValue` DECIMAL(10,2),
  ADD COLUMN `prepaidDueDate` DATE;

-- Remove old columns that are no longer needed
ALTER TABLE `clients`
  DROP COLUMN `email`,
  DROP COLUMN `notes`,
  DROP COLUMN `goal`;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PiQ8e52qW4Xjb6.root --database 5UbJ997E6SHYZid72bThxF --execute 
-- Add new columns to clients table
ALTER TABLE `clients`
  ADD COLUMN `planType` ENUM('monthly','package') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'monthly',
  ADD COLUMN `packageSessions` INT,
  ADD COLUMN `sessionsRemaining` INT,
  ADD COLUMN `packageValue` DECIMAL(10,2),
  ADD COLUMN `sessionsPerWeek` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  ADD COLUMN `sessionDays` VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN `sessionTime` VARCHAR(5),
  ADD COLUMN `sessionDuration` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  ADD COLUMN `prepaidValue` DECIMAL(10,2),
  ADD COLUMN `prepaidDueDate` DATE;

-- Remove old columns that are no longer needed
ALTER TABLE `clients`
  DROP COLUMN `email`,
  DROP COLUMN `notes`,
  DROP COLUMN `goal`;
